## Describe the bug

A clear description of what went wrong.

## Which area is affected?

- [ ] Model routing advice
- [ ] MAX_THINKING_TOKENS guidance
- [ ] Subagent configuration
- [ ] Caching strategies
- [ ] Cost estimation / tracking
- [ ] CLAUDE.md audit checklist
- [ ] MCP token audit
- [ ] Prompt efficiency patterns
- [ ] Other

## Steps to reproduce

1. Applied the setting / followed the advice: ...
2. Observed this result: ...
3. Expected this instead: ...

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include cost figures or token counts if relevant.

## Environment

- Claude Code version: [e.g., 1.0.0]
- Model used: [e.g., Sonnet, Opus]
- OS: [e.g., macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Settings applied: [e.g., MAX_THINKING_TOKENS=10000]

## Additional context

Any other information that might help diagnose the issue.
